This file tracks ALL session logs processed across all agents to prevent duplication and maintain audit trails.

## 🔧 Processing Rules

- **Never delete** entries from the Master Log
- **Always append** new entries (use `edit_file` for partial updates)
- **One file = one entry** per processing run
- **Track the run ID** to avoid reprocessing during the same session
